connectors.name: Desktop System
connectors.description: Native macOS control for apps, windows, screenshots, audio, and desktop actions.

connectors.name: Browser Operator
connectors.description: Live browser inspection, navigation, clicking, and page summarization.

connectors.name: Knowledge Vault
connectors.description: Local markdown retrieval, memory inspection, note handling, and source-grounded recall.

connectors.name: Terminal Operator
connectors.description: Shell execution and file operations under the local Jarvis trust boundary.

connectors.name: Google Workspace
connectors.description: Gmail and Calendar integration for mail triage, meeting context, and scheduling.

connectors.name: Managed Runtime
connectors.description: Daemon-backed task execution, agent registry, task lifecycle, and isolated code workspaces.
